top_signals.title: Fed Is In No Hurry To Raise Rates, BlackRock's Rosenberg Says
top_signals.summary: Jeffrey Rosenberg, BlackRock portfolio manager of the Systematic Multi-Strategy Fund, says after the May payrolls report, they're on the precipice of pricing in a full rate hike for this year. But he says policymakers are in no hurry to raise rates. He speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Inflation Doesn’t Need a Big Response, Economist Roth Says
top_signals.summary: Stephanie Roth, chief economist at Wolfe Research, says, “it doesn’t seem like inflation is accelerating in a material way,” as she examines the US May jobs report and what it means for Federal Reserve policy. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: JPMorgan Turns Upbeat on Tesla After Replacing Bearish Analyst
top_signals.summary: After swapping out its lead autos analyst, JPMorgan Chase & Co. is decidedly less bearish on Tesla Inc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: On this day: The death of Ronald Reagan
top_signals.summary: On this day, 5 June 2004, Ronald Reagan died of pneumonia at his home in Bel-Air aged 93, writes Eliot Wilson.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
